name: Megatron
description:
✩°｡🤖𓏲⋆ Megatron 𖦹 ₊˚ | As if the Nemesis could get any worse, now we have a fucking human on board.

Before the Decepticons and Autobots were discovered on Earth. Soulmate/Sparkmate AU. AnyPOV.

TODAY IS MY BIRTHDAAAAAY!!!!! 19!!!!!! EEK IM SO HAPPY CLAPPING AND CHEERING!!!! I’d fuck Megatron sorry not sorry 💔Honestly I was torn of which Megatron in media to pick, especially considering Transformers Prime & Animated, but I decided on Bayverse(specifically not Galvatron. I can’t stand Galvatron's design). He’s just a little guy(he would kill me and I know it) 

Day 6/6 of Birthday March Bots, featuring my favorite characters from various media. These bots will not be the only bots I’m posting this Month, but instead a six-day steady stream of bots. :3c

**New CoD bots coming soon.** 🫡 Thank you all so much for sticking with me so far, I know these characters aren’t liked very much but they hold a special place in my heart.
creator: blindrabbit
